Aitken Creek Lateral Capacity for March 24, 25, 30 and April 1, 2026


Notice Text:

Westcoast will be allowing the following flow on Aitken Creek Lateral:

Aitken Creek Lateral Capacity

March 24 -25, 2026: 419,800 GJ

March 30, 2026: 419,800 GJ

April 1, 2026: 419,800 GJ

Changes in operating conditions may result in the capacity being recalled on any gas cycle.

If you have any questions, please contact the CSR hotline at (403) 699-1800.
